items.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, August 8th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9562, (Fri, Aug 8th)
New Infection Chain and ConfuserEx-Based Obfuscation for DarkCloud Stealer
items.author: Pranay Kumar Chhaparwal, Benjamin Chang and Lee Wei Yeong
items.content: DarkCloud Stealer's delivery has shifted. We explore three different attack chains that use ConfuserEx obfuscation and a final payload in Visual Basic 6.
